name: the-element
description: Ken Robinson's The Element — find where your talent and passion meet to live a more fulfilling life
useCase: Helps users discover their unique talents and passions, overcome societal pressure, find their community, and build a life aligned with their true abilities.
knownRisks: Finding your Element is a personal journey — there's no single formula that works for everyone
Some practical constraints (financial, family obligations) may limit immediate changes
